story.iWant: registration to automatically assign default role
story.soThat: new users have proper permissions from creation
story.tasks: 1. Registration flow updated (Epic 2 Story 2.2) 2. Create User → Assign default role via UserRole 3. Domain context required 4. Default role from domain's seed data 5. Role validation before assignment 6. Transaction-based (all or nothing) 7. OTP SMS after role assignment

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Create User → Assign default role via UserRole
Default role from domain's seed data

doc.title: Epic 16: Clean Relational Role Design
doc.snippet: Registration flow automatically assigns default role via UserRole junction table with domain context

doc.title: Epic 3: User Management & RBAC
doc.snippet: Existing registration flow implementation that needs updating for clean relational design

doc.title: System Architecture
doc.snippet: Multi-tenant architecture with domain-scoped role management

doc.title: User Prisma Model
doc.snippet: User model with ONLY userRoles relation, NO role string field

file.reason: Current registration implementation with legacy role field usage
DTO requiring role field removal - currently has @IsEnum(['admin', 'staff', 'manager'])
Clean authorization service supporting UserRole junction table - already implemented
OTP service used after registration for phone verification

constraints.constraint: Default role lookup: WHERE domainID = user.domainID AND name = 'staff'
Insert into UserRole junction table with proper foreign keys
Error handling with rollback on failure
No role field in User model - use ONLY UserRole
Domain context required for all role operations

interface.name: RegisterDto
UserResDto

tests.standards: Jest unit tests with @nestjs/testing, Prisma test database, transaction rollback testing

test.idea: User registration creates user with default 'staff' role via UserRole junction
Registration uses transaction - failure rolls back user creation
Default role selected from domain's seed data
Role assignment happens AFTER user creation in transaction
OTP SMS sent after successful role assignment
RegisterDto no longer requires role field
New user has userRoles relation populated with default role
